sglang.title: Enable custom AR for AMD GPUs and maintain it in sgl-kernel
sglang.author: hubertlu-tw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current SGLang on AMD GPUs fails to leverage vLLM custom AR. To further remove the dependency on vLLM's custom AR in SGLang, we plan to maintain the custom AR kernel in sgl-kernel for ROCm.

sglang.title: [feat] add small vocab table for eagle's draft model[1].
sglang.author: Zhou-sx
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In speculative decoding, while the draft model's decode layers are drastically reduced, the computational bottleneck shifts to its lm_head (proportional to vocabulary size). In our case, the profile file shows that the small model decode takes approximately 1.8ms at a time, with lm-head o

sglang.title: Add fast decode plan for flashinfer mla
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using flashinfer mla backend and cuda graph together, graph replay will be hanged due to transmission of indptr tensors between cpu and gpu in BatchMLAPagedAttentionWrapper.plan.
This PR fixes this issue by adding a new decode_seq_len_cpu in forward batch and customizing a faster dec

sglang.bodyExcerpt: Reverts #3987 because it introduces regression for other cases.

sglang.title: Optimize Triton Kernel of Group GEMM in DeepGEMM Benchmark
sglang.author: hebiao064
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In the previous pull request (#3993), we introduced a vanilla Group GEMM Triton kernel to address the absence of such implementations in SGLang and vLLM. However, we observed that while DeepGEMM demonstrates high performance, our Triton kernel's speed was significantly slower. Upon invest

vllm.title: [v0][structured output] Support reasoning output
vllm.author: gaocegege
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Ref #12619
Only apply Guided/Structured grammar after reasoning steps in Reasoning models. It enabled reasoning outputs for xgrammar and outlines, didn't support lm-format-enforcer.
Usage:
vllm serve deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B --enable-reasoning --reasoning-parser deepseek_r1

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Explicitly include "omp.h" for MacOS to avoid installation failure
vllm.author: realShengYao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
If we detect MacOS, explicitly include "omp.h". This helps to avoid the installation failure mentioned in #14034 .
FIX #14034

vllm.title: [Misc][Platform] Move use allgather to platform
vllm.author: MengqingCao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Mainly changes

Move use_all_gather to platform so that the oot devices could override it instead of modifying in vLLM
Add check of sampling_metadata.seq_groups before applying logits processor, as when using all-gather, the logits is not none, but sampling_metadata.seq_groups is none, so _apply_log
